option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
import { StrictMode } from 'react' import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client' import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom' import { library } from '@fortawesome/fontawesome-svg-core' import { fas } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons' import { CartProvider } from './context/CartContext' import './index.css' import App from './App.tsx'
library.add(fas)
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render( <StrictMode> <BrowserRouter> <CartProvider> <App /> </CartProvider> </BrowserRouter> </StrictMode>, )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import { StrictMode } from 'react' import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client' import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom' import { library } from '@fortawesome/fontawesome-svg-core' import { fas } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons' import { CartProvider } from './context/CartContext' import { WatchlistProvider } from './context/WatchlistContext' import './index.css' import App from './App.tsx'
library.add(fas)
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render( <StrictMode> <BrowserRouter> <CartProvider> <WatchlistProvider> <App /> </WatchlistProvider> </CartProvider> </BrowserRouter> </StrictMode>, )

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
